'''zhorajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaciological|glaciological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaciological|glaciological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhorajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorajithi|zhorajithi]] || [[word:zhorajiji|zhorajiji]] || [[word:zhorajishi|zhorajishi]] || [[word:zhorajiki|zhorajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorajuthuthu|zhorajuthuthu]] || [[word:zhorajujuju|zhorajujuju]] || [[word:zhorajushushu|zhorajushushu]] || [[word:zhorajukuku|zhorajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorajuthu|zhorajuthu]] || [[word:zhorajuju|zhorajuju]] || [[word:zhorajushu|zhorajushu]] || [[word:zhorajuku|zhorajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorajufthuf|zhorajufthuf]] || [[word:zhorajufjuf|zhorajufjuf]] || [[word:zhorajufshuf|zhorajufshuf]] || [[word:zhorajufkuf|zhorajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorajethe|zhorajethe]] || [[word:zhorajeje|zhorajeje]] || [[word:zhorajeshe|zhorajeshe]] || [[word:zhorajeke|zhorajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorajothotho|zhorajothotho]] || [[word:zhorajojojo|zhorajojojo]] || [[word:zhorajoshosho|zhorajoshosho]] || [[word:zhorajokoko|zhorajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorajotho|zhorajotho]] || [[word:zhorajojo|zhorajojo]] || [[word:zhorajosho|zhorajosho]] || [[word:zhorajoko|zhorajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorajofthof|zhorajofthof]] || [[word:zhorajofjof|zhorajofjof]] || [[word:zhorajofshof|zhorajofshof]] || [[word:zhorajofkof|zhorajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorajïfthïf|zhorajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfjïf|zhorajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfshïf|zhorajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfkïf|zhorajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorajïfthïfthïf|zhorajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfjïfjïf|zhorajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfshïfshïf|zhorajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfkïfkïf|zhorajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorajïfthïf|zhorajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfjïf|zhorajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfshïf|zhorajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfkïf|zhorajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorajïfthïf|zhorajïfthïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfjïf|zhorajïfjïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfshïf|zhorajïfshïf]] || [[word:zhorajïfkïf|zhorajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhorajæthæ|zhorajæthæ]] || [[word:zhorajæjæ|zhorajæjæ]] || [[word:zhorajæshæ|zhorajæshæ]] || [[word:zhorajækæ|zhorajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhorajathatha|zhorajathatha]] || [[word:zhorajajaja|zhorajajaja]] || [[word:zhorajashasha|zhorajashasha]] || [[word:zhorajakaka|zhorajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhorajatha|zhorajatha]] || [[word:zhorajaja|zhorajaja]] || [[word:zhorajasha|zhorajasha]] || [[word:zhorajaka|zhorajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhorajafthaf|zhorajafthaf]] || [[word:zhorajafjaf|zhorajafjaf]] || [[word:zhorajafshaf|zhorajafshaf]] || [[word:zhorajafkaf|zhorajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhorajasha|zhorajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorajshësha|zhorajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorajrosha|zhorajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorajmusha|zhorajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorajyasha|zhorajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhorajnkshësha|gozhorajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhorajnkrosha|gozhorajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhorajnkmusha|gozhorajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhorajnkyasha|gozhorajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhorarajasha|zhorarajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorarajshësha|zhorarajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorarajrosha|zhorarajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorarajmusha|zhorarajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorarajyasha|zhorarajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhorarajnkshësha|gozhorarajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhorarajnkrosha|gozhorarajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhorarajnkmusha|gozhorarajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhorarajnkyasha|gozhorarajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheræjasha|zheræjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheræjshësha|zheræjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheræjrosha|zheræjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheræjmusha|zheræjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheræjyasha|zheræjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheræjnkshësha|gozheræjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheræjnkrosha|gozheræjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheræjnkmusha|gozheræjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheræjnkyasha|gozheræjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhorfajasha|zhorfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhorfajshësha|zhorfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhorfajrosha|zhorfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhorfajmusha|zhorfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhorfajyasha|zhorfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhorfajnkshësha|gozhorfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhorfajnkrosha|gozhorfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhorfajnkmusha|gozhorfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhorfajnkyasha|gozhorfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
